name: rAthena Items Knowledge Pack
description: Knowledge about item databases, schemas, YAML parameters, and connections between server-side item definitions and client-side itemInfo.

entries.title: Item Database YAML Schema
entries.summary: Structure of standard YAML item databases in rAthena.
entries.details: The item database (db/import/item_db.yml or db/re/item_db.yml) consists of a Header (Type: ITEM_DB, Version: 1) and a Body. Each item requires 'Id', 'AegisName', 'Type', 'Buy' (optional), 'Sell' (optional), and 'Weight'. Custom parameters include slots, script executions, and job limits.
warnings: An AegisName must be globally unique. Duplicate AegisNames will cause validation warnings or server crashes during load.

entries.title: Client-Side itemInfo Integration
entries.summary: Mapping server-side items to client-side itemInfo.lua / lub entries.
entries.details: Ragnarok clients display custom items based on the 'System/itemInfo.lua' (or .lub) entry. The primary link is the 'Id' (which matches the server-side ID). Key properties inside itemInfo include 'unidentifiedDisplayName', 'unidentifiedResourceName', 'identifiedDisplayName', 'identifiedResourceName', and description lines arrays. The identified/unidentified resource names determine which sprite/ACT files are loaded from the GRF.
warnings: Clients compiling itemInfo to bytecode lub must be in uncompressed/readable format. Bytecode lub files are blocked during dry-runs due to parsing constraints.
